title: CmdError
description: Wire-format error envelope for Tauri renderer↔main IPC error responses. Mirrors the runtime-main `CmdError` enum's serde(tag = "type", rename_all = "snake_case") encoding. Used by src/lib/ipc.ts::unwrapCmdError.

ErrorMessage.title: ErrorMessage
ErrorMessage.description: Human-readable error message body. Non-empty per validation; not localized at v0.1.

oneOf.title: SetupRequired
oneOf.description: API key not present in OS keychain; renderer prompts user to invoke set_api_key. Unit variant — no message field.

oneOf.title: Provider
oneOf.description: LLMProvider error (Anthropic API failure, network, parsing).

oneOf.title: Drone
oneOf.description: Drone IPC failure (subprocess died, framing error, timeout).

oneOf.title: KeyStore
oneOf.description: OS keychain failure. Wraps keyring crate errors.

oneOf.title: Internal
oneOf.description: Catch-all for unexpected runtime errors. Should be rare.

oneOf.title: PathNotPermitted
oneOf.description: A renderer-supplied filesystem path was refused because it resolves outside the dialog-registered roots (M09.5.A / TD-051). The shell confines save_framework/load_framework/import_artifact(file) before any IO; this variant is the typed refusal the renderer renders.
